pageDescription: Calculate the equivalent sizes of round, square, and rectangular cake pans for recipe scaling and baking adjustments

area.title: Pan Area Calculations
area.description: Round: πr², Square: side², Rectangular: length × width

volume.title: Volume Considerations
volume.description: Volume = Area × Depth (assumes same pan depth)

adjustments.title: Recipe Adjustments
adjustments.description: Multiply ingredients by the area ratio when changing pan sizes

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides pan size conversions only
criticalWarningsList.baking: Consider baking time and temperature adjustments when changing pan sizes

importantNotesList: Larger pans may require reduced baking time and/or lower temperature
Smaller pans may require increased baking time and/or higher temperature
Ensure pans have similar depth for accurate volume calculations
Consider pan material and color as they affect baking results

messages.enterInformation: Enter your cake pan information to calculate equivalents
messages.resultMessage: Your cake pan equivalent calculation is shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides cake pan size conversions based on geometric formulas. Actual baking results may vary based on pan depth, material, oven calibration, and other factors.

seekHelp.title: Baking Resources
seekHelp.content: For professional baking advice and recipe development, consult baking professionals or culinary resources for specialized techniques and ingredient considerations.

errors.inputPan: Please select an input pan type
errors.inputDimensions: Please enter valid input pan dimensions
errors.outputPan: Please select an output pan type
errors.outputDimensions: Please enter valid output pan dimensions

tooltips.inputPan: The type of pan you're converting from
tooltips.outputPan: The type of pan you're converting to
tooltips.adjustRecipe: Whether to calculate recipe quantity adjustments

select_pan_shape_and_enter_dimensions_to: Select pan shape and enter dimensions to calculate volume
enter_recipe_pan_volume_to_get_scaling_r: Enter recipe pan volume to get scaling ratio for adjusting ingredient quantities.
select_shape_enter_dimensions_and_click_: Select shape, enter dimensions and click
times_larger_than_the_recipe_pan_multipl:
times larger than the recipe pan. Multiply all
                            ingredients by
times_smaller_than_the_recipe_pan_multip:
times smaller than the recipe pan. Multiply all
                            ingredients by
your_pan_is_the_same_size_as_the_recipe_: Your pan is the same size as the recipe pan. Use the original recipe quantities.
pan_volume_determines_how_much_batter_yo:
Pan volume determines how much batter your pan can hold and affects baking time, texture, and
                        rise. Using the wrong pan size can result in overflow, uneven baking, or flat cakes.
your_pan_is_larger_than_the_recipe_pan_i: Your pan is larger than the recipe pan - increase ingredients
your_pan_is_smaller_than_the_recipe_pan_: Your pan is smaller than the recipe pan - reduce ingredients
your_pan_is_the_same_size_as_the_recipe_: Your pan is the same size as the recipe pan - use original recipe
adjust_baking_time_larger_pans_need_more: Adjust baking time: larger pans need more time
